summary: Excellent audience recording that captures an amazing crowd pull
review: The single review highlights this as a superb audience tape, praising the vivid crowd energy and giving it a perfect five‑star rating. No specific musical or technical details are mentioned beyond the enthusiastic reaction to the audience sound, suggesting the recording is both listenable and enjoyable despite the lack of setlist information.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review, focusing on the audience pull; strong positive sentiment for recording quality but no data on musical performance, leading to a high yet uncertain rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape praised for its vivid crowd capture; no specific sound issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or song performance were provided.
